_comment: Persistent manual variety aliases for cross-broker matches the automatic rules can't catch (e.g. one broker appends a color the other omits). Key = a broker's cleaned variety name lowercased (HE/OR code, #/(R)/TM, and -CC/-URC suffix already removed); value = the canonical name to use instead. Reapplied on every parse run, so add a line once and it persists every year. To find new ones: node scripts/find_unmatched.js
